mapper.sql: resource_id, system_code, resource_source_pk_id, resource_biz_type, resource_type, resource_name, resource_desc, avatar, sample, tags, resource_version_id, host_type, catalog_id, man_org_id, man_user_id, index_list, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, com_acct_id, resource_status, resource_d_verid, resource_r_verid, resource_code, parent_resource_id, impl_type, worker_agent_type
mapper.select: select a.resource_rel_detail_id, a.resource_id, a.rel_resource_id, b.resource_source_pk_id from ss_resource_rel_detail a join ss_resource b on a.rel_resource_id = b.resource_id where a.resource_id =#{resourceId}

select a.resource_id, a.system_code, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.host_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.index_list, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.resource_status, a.resource_code, b.resource_id, b.agent_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.agent_sse_head, b.agent_sse_url, b.agent_web_url, b.agent_admin_url_list, b.prologue, b.agent_sse_url_ori, b.agent_web_url_ori, b.agent_admin_url_ori_list, b.create_type, b.agent_home_url, b.home_type, b.auth_type, b.integration_type, b.ability, b.constraints, b.faqs, b.role_attributes, b.processing_flow, b.personality_dimensions, b.word_preferences, b.sentence_and_tone from ss_resource a join ss_res_ext_dig_employee b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id where a.resource_id =#{resourceId}

select b.resource_id, b.resource_code, b.system_code, b.resource_source_pk_id, b.resource_biz_type, b.resource_type, b.resource_name, b.resource_desc, b.avatar, b.sample, b.tags, b.resource_version_id, b.host_type, b.catalog_id, b.man_org_id, b.man_user_id, b.index_list, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.com_acct_id, b.resource_status, b.resource_d_verid, b.resource_r_verid, b.parent_resource_id, b.impl_type, b.worker_agent_type, a.rel_resource_info from ss_resource_rel_detail a join ss_resource b on a.rel_resource_id = b.resource_id where a.resource_id = #{resourceId}

SELECT a.resource_id as resourceId, b.org_name as orgName, c.catalog_name as catalogName, d.target_quality as score, COALESCE( (SELECT STRING_AGG(u.user_name, ',') FROM au_privilege_grant g LEFT JOIN po_users u ON g.grant_to_obj_id = u.user_id WHERE g.grant_type = 'ALLOW_MANAGE' AND g.grant_obj_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' AND g.grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' AND g.grant_obj_id = a.resource_id), '' ) AS manUserName FROM ss_resource a LEFT JOIN po_organization b ON a.man_org_id = b.org_id LEFT JOIN ss_resource_catalog c ON a.catalog_id = c.catalog_id LEFT JOIN byai_monitor_target d ON a.resource_id = d.agent_id WHERE a.resource_id = #{resourceId};
mapper.insert:
insert into ss_resource ( resource_id, system_code, resource_source_pk_id, resource_biz_type, resource_type, resource_name, resource_desc, avatar, sample, tags, resource_version_id, host_type, catalog_id, man_org_id, man_user_id, index_list, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, com_acct_id, resource_status, resource_d_verid, resource_r_verid, resource_code, parent_resource_id, impl_type, worker_agent_type ) values
( #{item.resourceId}, #{item.systemCode}, #{item.resourceSourcePkId}, #{item.resourceBizType}, #{item.resourceType}, #{item.resourceName}, #{item.resourceDesc}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.sample}, #{item.tags}, #{item.resourceVersionId}, #{item.hostType}, #{item.catalogId}, #{item.manOrgId}, #{item.manUserId}, #{item.indexList}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.comAcctId}, #{item.resourceStatus}, #{item.resourceDVerid}, #{item.resourceRVerid}, #{item.resourceCode}, #{item.parentResourceId}, #{item.implType}, #{item.workerAgentType} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.resource_id, r.resource_biz_type, r.resource_name, r.man_user_id, org.org_name, c.catalog_name, pr.position_id, p.position_name, mt.target_quality, pr.status, pr.on_job_time FROM ss_resource r LEFT JOIN ss_res_position_relation pr ON pr.resource_id = r.resource_id LEFT JOIN po_position p ON pr.position_id = p.position_id LEFT JOIN po_organization org ON r.man_org_id = org.org_id LEFT JOIN ss_resource_catalog c ON r.catalog_id = c.catalog_id LEFT JOIN byai_monitor_target mt ON r.resource_id = mt.agent_id WHERE r.resource_id = #{resourceId} AND r.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' LIMIT 1

SELECT ss_resource_rel_detail.rel_resource_id, ss_resource.resource_name, ss_resource.resource_biz_type FROM ss_resource_rel_detail LEFT JOIN ss_resource ON ss_resource_rel_detail.rel_resource_id = ss_resource.resource_id WHERE ss_resource_rel_detail.resource_id = #{resourceId}

SELECT a.resource_id, a.system_code, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.resource_version_id, a.host_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.index_list, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.com_acct_id, a.resource_status, a.resource_d_verid, a.resource_r_verid, a.resource_code, a.parent_resource_id FROM ss_resource a
AND a.create_by = #{createBy}
AND ( a.resource_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.resource_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY a.update_time DESC, a.create_time DESC

select a.catalog_id as id, a.catalog_name as name, 'folder' as type, null as fileId, null as fileName, a.create_time as createTime, a.create_by as createBy, b.user_name as createStaffName from ss_resource_catalog a join po_users b on a.create_by = b.user_id where resource_id = #{resourceId} and p_catalog_id = #{pCatalogId} union all select a.file_id as id, a.file_name as name, 'file' as type, a.file_id as fileId, a.file_name as fileName, a.complete_time as createTime, a.create_by as createBy, b.user_name as createStaffName from byai_files a join po_users b on a.create_by = b.user_id where a.dataset_id =#{resourceId} and a.file_collect_id = #{pCatalogId}

select a.resource_id, a.system_code, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.create_by, a.create_time, b.type from ss_resource a left join ss_res_ext_doc b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id where a.resource_id = #{resourceId}
